channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Man Arrested for Multiple Driving Offenses in Dickson
item.description: A 38-year-old man from Dickson has been arrested following alleged driving offenses that include operating an unregistered, uninsured vehicle while disqualified from driving. Police identified the Mit...

item.title: Updated Screen Time Guidelines for Kids Focus on Context Over Limits
item.description: Recent research has prompted a shift in screen time guidelines for children, moving away from strict time limits toward a more nuanced approach that considers the context of digital media use. Experts...

item.title: Kenyan Prince Apologizes to Girlfriend with Cash Gift After Controversy
item.description: Stephanie Ngunjiri, girlfriend of social media influencer Kenyan Prince, shared a TikTok video showing a suitcase filled with KSh 1,000 notes wrapped in clear tape. The cash gift was part of Prince's ...

item.title: Opinion: Simon Tisdall argues Trump's handling of the Iran conflict has deepened international instability
item.description: In this opinion article, Simon Tisdall argues that Donald Trump's leadership, rather than Iran itself, has become the principal source of international instability during the renewed conflict between ...

item.title: Legal expert argues no basis for Gbajabiamila's resignation over PFIPC allegations
item.description: Legal practitioner, Mr. Jiti Ogunye, has defended Chief of Staff Femi Gbajabiamila against calls for his resignation linked to alleged fake Presidential Foreign Investment Promotion Council (PFIPC) cl...

item.title: Stellenbosch Wine Festival Celebrates 55th Anniversary with Nine-Day Event
item.description: The Stellenbosch Wine Festival is set to return for its 55th anniversary, offering a nine-day celebration of wine, gourmet food, and cultural experiences across the region. Running from July 25 to Aug...

item.title: Tanzanian Researchers Develop AI Platform to Boost Onion and Garlic Farming Efficiency
item.description: Researchers at the Institute of Accountancy Arusha (IAA) have developed an AI-powered digital platform called Pataintel to enhance onion and garlic farming in Tanzania. The platform provides farmers w...

item.title: Legal Dispute Over Deposition of Will Smith in Jada Pinkett Smith Lawsuit
item.description: Will Smith could face legal complications as his former friend, Bilaal Salaam, attempts to depose him in a lawsuit against Jada Pinkett Smith. Legal documents reveal that Salaam has requested a deposi...

item.title: Play School Turns 60: Balancing Nostalgia and Modern Media Challenges
item.description: The iconic Australian children's television program, Play School, celebrates its 60th anniversary in 2026, facing the challenge of staying relevant amid the rise of streaming platforms and AI-driven c...

item.title: Nordstrom's Anniversary Sale Features 20 Top Deals and Exclusive Offers
item.description: Nordstrom's Anniversary Sale has officially begun, offering significant discounts on a wide range of products. The sale, which started on July 14 for Nordstrom cardmembers, is now open to the public. ...

item.title: Mudavadi Confident in UDA's Strength Amid Ol Kalou By-Election Loss
item.description: Prime Cabinet Secretary Musalia Mudavadi has downplayed the United Democratic Alliance's (UDA) heavy defeat in the Ol Kalou by-election, dismissing it as a routine outcome that doesn't signal deeper i...

item.title: Engineered Bacteria Enable Biodegradable Plastic to Fully Decompose in Six Days
item.description: Researchers have developed a novel type of 'living plastic' that utilizes engineered bacteria to completely degrade within six days without producing microplastics. This innovation addresses the persi...

item.title: Argentina's Scaloni on Fan Support and World Cup Final Preparations
item.description: Argentina's manager Lionel Scaloni emphasized the crucial role of fan support in driving the team's quest for a second World Cup title ahead of their final clash against Spain. Speaking at a press con...

item.title: Mariah Carey releases 30th-anniversary edition of 'Daydream' featuring unheard private recordings
item.description: Mariah Carey has released a 30th-anniversary edition of her iconic 1995 album 'Daydream', offering fans an expanded collection that includes previously unreleased material, rare B-sides, remixes, and ...

item.title: Amazon's Counterfeit Problem and the App Fighting Fake Products
item.description: Amazon faces a significant challenge with counterfeit goods on its platform, prompting the creation of a browser extension called Knockoff. The article highlights how third-party sellers often use pse...

item.title: Albanese challenges Taylor on One Nation ties amid Islamophobia debate
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has challenged Opposition Leader Angus Taylor to distance himself from One Nation during a press conference launching the government's response to an Islamophobia repor...

item.title: Tanzania's Majestic Wilderness and Safari Haven
item.description: The article highlights Tanzania's status as a top wildlife conservation area and prime safari location. It emphasizes the country's natural beauty, biodiversity, and eco-tourism potential. While the t...

item.title: Nigeria's AKK gas pipeline faces six-year delay due to delays and challenges
item.description: The Ajaokuta-Kano-Kaduna (AKK) gas pipeline project, conceived in 2020 to improve gas supply across Nigeria, is still not operational after six years. Despite reaching 98% completion, delays persist d...

item.title: Nompumelelo Sobopha's Journey of Faith on Married at First Sight Mzansi
item.description: Nompumelelo Sobopha, a 24-year-old entrepreneur, joined Season 3 of Married at First Sight Mzansi after feeling disillusioned with traditional dating. The show, which pairs strangers for marriage, has...

item.title: Senators Condemn China's AI-Generated Video Depicting Filipinos as Monkeys, Demand Apology
item.description: A group of Filipino senators has strongly condemned a controversial AI-generated video published by China Daily that portrays Filipinos as monkeys. The video, which shows a monkey wearing a barong bei...
